resume.careerObjective: To build strong fundamentals in computer science and web development by working on small practical projects, exploring new technologies, and improving through continuous learning. I aim to grow as a dedicated CSIT student at Symbiosis by applying my skills in real situations, collaborating with peers, and developing problem-solving and creativity in the tech field.

record.institution: Symbiosis University of Applied Science, Indore

project.title: Figma Design for Website
project.description: Created UI/UX mockups for a multipage website, focusing on layout structure, color themes, and user-friendly design. Used frames, components, and prototype links for navigation.

project.title: Website for a School
project.description: Designed a responsive school website with sections such as About, Gallery, Admission Info, and a Contact Form. Used HTML, CSS, and basic JavaScript for page interactions.

interests.interest: Tech videos, design inspiration, and coding challenges
